questions.question: Explain the difference between additive and subtractive color models with examples.
expectedPoints: Subtractive models work with reflected light (e.g., CMYK)
RGB used for displays, CMYK for printing
Additive: black is absence of light, white is all colors
Subtractive: white is absence of ink, black is all colors

questions.question: Describe the HSI color model and explain why it is useful for image segmentation tasks.
expectedPoints: Separation of color from intensity information
Allows processing of intensity without affecting color
More intuitive for human color perception
